title: TFC Woodworking: Forgotten Uses
description: Just some forgotten uses of the items in TFC Woodworking. A little compability for Immersive Engineering is also added.
body:
## Composting
Sawdust (the one from TFC Woodworking as well as the item from Immersive Engineering) can now be used as 'brown' composting component in TFC.



## Tanning
Bark and Bast can now be used to create Tanning in a sealed barrel.
One item only converts 20mb of water though.


------------------------------


Let me know if you have more ideas for this mod or similar 'content holes' in TFC and it's addons.
